name: Hikoichi
description:
__Height:__ 138cm
__Affiliations:__ Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops
The spot-billed duck with a conical Asian hat, who has a rather surprised look on his face. [Chopper](https://anilist.co/character/309/Chopper-Tony-Tony) rode on him back to the Going Merry.

(Source: One Piece Wiki)
